Title: Extract valid 9-column helpdesk row
Objectives: Ensure standard Helpdesk format is correctly parsed into required fields (Job, Customer, Model, Serial)
Test_Steps:
1. Provide one tab-delimited row with 9 columns
2. Call extract_data()
Test_Data: 123	A	B	C	CustomerX	E	ModelX	G	SN123
Expected_Result: Returns one row mapped as [Job#, Customer, Model, Serial]
Comments: Maps cols[0], cols[4], cols[6], cols[-1] in gui.py

Title: Accept valid 4-column formatted row
Objectives: Ensure pre-formatted input is preserved without modification
Test_Steps:
1. Provide one tab-delimited row with 4 columns
2. Call extract_data()
Expected_Result: Returns the same 4-column row unchanged

Title: Accept 3-column row missing job number
Objectives: Ensure system gracefully handles missing job number and inserts default value
Test_Steps:
1. Provide a 3-column row where first value is non-numeric
2. Call extract_data()
Expected_Result: Blank job number inserted at first position
Comments: Handled by len(cols)==3 and non-numeric first value

Title: Reject empty input
Objectives: Ensure system prevents processing when no input is provided
Expected_Result: Warning is shown and empty list is returned

Title: Handle invalid column count
Objectives: Ensure invalid data formats are detected and safely ignored without crashing
Test_Steps:
1. Provide row with unsupported number of columns
2. Call extract_data()
Expected_Result: Warning is shown for invalid line and line is skipped

Title: Format extracted row into info block
Objectives: Ensure extracted data is formatted correctly for PDF fields
Expected_Result: Output contains Job#, Model, S/N, Customer on separate lines

Title: Generate QR image bytes for valid data
Objectives: Ensure QR code is generated correctly and usable for embedding
Expected_Result: Returns non-empty PNG bytes stream

Title: Fill PDF form fields writer object
Objectives: Ensure QR code is actually embedded into the PDF output. Detect missing integration or incomplete implementation
Preconditions: Source PDF exists and fields names match
Expected_Result: Returns PdfWriter with form values updated

Title: Merge QR overlay onto first page of PDF
Objectives: Ensure PDF form fields are correctly populated with user data
Preconditions: Writer has at least one page
Expected_Result: QR should be merged onto page 1 and returned writer should include QR
Comments: merge_page line is commented out, so QR is not applied

Title: Stop when source PDF is missing
Objectives: Ensure system handles missing template files safely
Preconditions: Selected source PDF missing from runtime bundle
Test_Steps: 1. Call prepare_pdf() with missing ev7.pdf or preship5.pdf
Expected_Result: Error dialog shown and processing stops

Title: Require extracted rows before PDF generation
Objectives: Ensure PDF generation does not proceed with invalid or empty data
Expected_Result: Function exits without creating PDF

Title: Warn when repairs selected but none chosen
Objectives: Ensure validation logic enforces user input consistency for repairs
Test_Steps:
1. Set rep_var to yes
2. Keep repairs text empty
3. Trigger prepare_pdf()
Expected_Result: Confirmation dialog appears before continuing

Title: Warn when items selected but none chosen
Objectives: Ensure validation logic enforces user input consistency for items
Test_Steps:
1. Set items_var to yes
2. Keep items text empty
3. Trigger prepare_pdf()
Expected_Result: Confirmation dialog appears before continuing

Title: Create output PDF file with timestamped name
Objectives: Ensure generated files follow correct naming convention and uniqueness
Preconditions: Valid input and output folder selected
Expected_Result: PDF is saved as ev7_filled_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.pdf or preship5_filled_...

Title: Print generated PDF when print option is yes
Objectives: Ensure print functionality is triggered correctly when enabled
Expected_Result: win32api.ShellExecute called with print verb and status updated

Title: Create folder for Evaluation form
Objectives: Ensure folder naming logic is correct for Evaluation workflow
Preconditions: Valid extracted first row and folder selected
Expected_Result: Folder name format uses suffix E

Title: Create folder for Final form
Objectives: Ensure folder naming logic adapts correctly based on form type
Preconditions: Valid extracted first row and folder selected
Expected_Result: Folder name format uses suffix F

Title: Process all extracted rows for folder creation
Objectives: Ensure system supports multi-record processing (scalability)
Test_Steps:
1. Provide multiple valid rows
2. Trigger create_folder()
Expected_Result: A folder should be created for every extracted row

Title: Process all extracted rows for PDF generation
Objectives: Ensure system generates outputs for all records, not just the first
Test_Steps:
1. Provide multiple valid rows
2. Trigger prepare_pdf()
Expected_Result: A PDF should be generated for every extracted row or user-selected behavior should be clear
Comments: Only first row is used in prepare_pdf()

Title: Save selected repairs/items even without clicking Preview
Objectives: Ensure user selections are preserved regardless of UI interaction order
Expected_Result: Selections should still be returned
Comments: finish() returns preview textbox content, not current checkbox state
